challenge_summary: Pass-10 governance reconciliation approved the refreshed apex-shared policy snapshot and the separately authorized 24-hour repository security-exception record. The review confirmed the record is narrowly scoped, time-bounded, fail-closed, distinct from Azure Policy exemptions, and does not authorize endpoint mutation, Gate 4, workflow dispatch, or workload operations.
compact_for_parent: Pass 10 (governance-reconciliation) | LOW | no must-fix or should-fix findings | Approved

suggestions.summary: Bind the qualification exception to issue #13 in the qualification-specific validator.
State explicitly that the repository authorization record is not an Azure Policy exemption.

verified_anchors: Live discovery remained complete with 6 assignments, 13 blockers, 32 auto-remediations, and zero Azure Policy exemptions.
The exception identity, control, scope, 24-hour maximum, 75-minute margin, endpoint lifecycle, and cleanup sequence match the runtime validator.
At-rest verification retained public network access Disabled, default action Deny, no IP or virtual-network rules, no SecurityControl tag, and shared keys disabled.
The plan leaves endpoint session, preview, Gate 4, workflow dispatch, workload operations, publication, and deletion unstarted or unauthorized.
residual_risk: The exception record authorizes only a later bounded session; preview, apply, cleanup, and authority-return behavior still require live execution evidence and separate Gate 4 decisions.
